dc:title: Street View with Historic Stone Wall and Church Dome
dc:description: Color street scene photographed from a low viewpoint behind the blurred handlebars and saddle of a bicycle or scooter in the foreground. A paved urban road curves gently alongside a long historic stone wall with crenellations and small openings on the left. Behind the wall rises a church or institutional building with a prominent domed roof and lantern. Several vehicles are visible on the road, including a blurred blue car passing close to the camera, a white van, and smaller cars farther ahead. A pedestrian walks along the sidewalk near the stone wall. On the right side of the image are trees, a streetlamp, roadside posts, and buildings with outdoor seating. The scene is brightly lit under a clear blue sky, suggesting a warm daytime urban setting.
